explanation: This command simulates the execution of LaZagne from a common temporary directory and uses the 'all' argument to dump all credentials. It matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria.
This command uses a common system directory and substitutes 'all' with '-all' to test if the Sigma rule detects equivalent command-line arguments.
This command omits the 'all' argument and specifies two modules, testing if the Sigma rule detects partial command-line patterns.
This command uses an alternative path and substitutes space-separated arguments with hyphen-prefixed flags to test if the Sigma rule detects equivalent command-line syntax.
This command uses a common user directory and specifies specific modules to test if the Sigma rule detects targeted credential dumping.
